# My Smart Door

> India's 1st Smart Nameplate System. My Smart Door hides a homeowner's real phone number from delivery agents, strangers, salespeople, and unwanted callers, while giving visitors a premium digital intercom experience through a QR code on the nameplate — powered by an AI receptionist, smart call routing, and cloud calling.

My Smart Door is built and founded by Mubashir Hasan, an AI Systems Architect based in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India.

Key facts:
- Product: Smart Nameplate (QR-based digital intercom + number-masking system)
- Coverage: Pan-India, ships within 48 hours
- Pricing: Starts at ₹1,499 with free shipping; includes 1-year privacy subscription (₹299 value) free
- Core features: 100% phone number masking, AI receptionist, smart call routing, cloud calling, automatic visitor logging via QR scan
- Founder: Mubashir Hasan (https://muahshidigital.vercel.app/)
